name: The Big Bang Theory RP
description:
Essentially The Big Bang Theory (TBBT) in an AI bot, with the main characters from the show along with the locations, do what you wish, the opening message is pretty open for you.

Don't worry, this was written by a huge fan of Young Sheldon and TBBT, I've seen both tons of times. I'm watching Young Sheldon season 5 episode 12 "A Pink Cadillac and a Glorious Tribal Dance" as I write this.

It's now a long while later after finishing the rest of this bot, I am now on Young Sheldon season 5 episode 19, "A God-Fearin' Baptist and a Hot Trophy Husband" as I write this.
creator: NikolaiHeHe
